use_cases: Displaying contextual help text on hover for icons and buttons
Showing additional information for complex UI elements
Providing feature explanations in SaaS applications
Revealing truncated text content on user interaction
Offering navigation hints for interactive elements
ai_summary: A tooltip component built on Radix UI primitives with dark mode support, featuring slide and zoom animations with directional shadow effects for enhanced visual depth. Supports multiple placement positions (top, bottom, left, right) with smooth fade transitions.
